description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsOlive green bag with knit textured patternMetal eyelets with shimmer fabric tie up which acts as a drawstringOne main compartmentSynthetic lining with a zippered pocket One zippered pocket at backOne zippered pocket at sideOne short handle for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 39 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 15 cm
